issues.sample: The contact owns a 2019 Mazda CX-9. The contact stated while driving 15 mph, she heard an abnormal noise. The contact stated no warning light was illuminated. The vehicle was not diagnosed or repaired. A dealer was not contacted. The manufacturer had been informed of the failure.

narrative.headline: What 2019 Mazda Cx-9 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 51 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (41% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
